title: Silk Hat Kid
writer: Gerald Beaumont, Edward Eliscu, Lou Breslow
actors: Lew Ayres, Mae Clarke, Paul Kelly
plot: Eddie Howard, a fast-thinking, two-fisted bodyguard, is hired by nightclub-owner Tim Martin to protect him from chiseling gangsters operating an extortion-racket. But Eddie meets and falls in love with Laura Grant, Tim's sweethear...
